title: AISI S100-16 Cold-Formed Steel Member Design
description: Design cold-formed steel members in accordance with AISI S100-16.

design_method.description: Design Method. Symbol: Method. Select between Allowable Strength Design (ASD), Load and Resistance Factor Design (LFRD) and Limit States Design (LSD).

manufacturer.description: Manufacturer. Symbol: Manufacturer. Select available manufacturers.

shape.description: Shape. Symbol: Shape. Select available shapes.

section.description: Section. Symbol: Section. Select from library to edit Section Dimensions.

d_input.description: D. Symbol: D. Units: in. Total height of section.

b_input.description: B. Symbol: B. Units: in. Total width of section.

b2_input.description: b2. Symbol: b_2. Units: in. Bottom width of section.

r_input.description: R. Symbol: R. Units: in. Fillet radius.

t_input.description: t. Symbol: t. Units: in. Thickness of section.

tl_input.description: d. Symbol: t_l. Units: in. Width of lip.

hat_angle.description: hat angle. Symbol: hat_angle. Hat Angle.

grade.description: Grade. Symbol: Grade. Select Custom to edit Material Properties.

f_y.description: Fy. Symbol: F_{y}. Units: ksi. Section Yield Strength.

f_u.description: Fu. Symbol: F_{u}. Units: ksi. Section Tensile Strength.

global_buckling.description: Global Buckling. Flexural Torsional Buckling checks will be skipped when set to Fully Braced.  (i.e. Mne = My & Pne = Py)

L_t.description: LT. Symbol: L_T. Units: ft. Unbraced length for twisting about the X-axis.

L_z.description: Lz. Symbol: L_z. Units: ft. Unbraced length for flexural buckling about the Z-axis.

L_y.description: Ly. Symbol: L_y. Units: ft. Unbraced length for flexural buckling about the Y-axis.

kt_input.description: Kt. Symbol: K_{t}. Effective length factor for twisting.

kz_input.description: Kz. Symbol: K_{z}. Effective length factor for flexural buckling about the Z-axis.

ky_input.description: Ky. Symbol: K_{y}. Effective length factor for flexural buckling about the Y-axis.

cb_input.description: Cb. Symbol: C_{b}. Moment gradient factor.

M_rz_input.description: Mrz. Symbol: M_{rz}. Units: kip-ft. Required flexural strength for bending about the major (Z) axis. Positive value results in compression at top of section.

M_ry_input.description: Mry. Symbol: M_{ry}. Units: kip-ft. Required flexural strength for bending about the minor (Y) Axis. Positive value results in compression at right of section.

V_ry_input.description: Vry. Symbol: V_{ry}. Units: kip. Required shear strength in major (Y) axis direction.

V_rz_input.description: Vrz. Symbol: V_{rz}. Units: kip. Required shear strength in minor (Z) axis direction.

P_r_input.description: Pr. Symbol: P_{r}. Units: kip. Required axial strength. Positive value represents compression.

load_axes.description: Load Axes. Select which axis system design loads are applied. Loads applied in Geometric Axes will be rotated to Principal Axes for Capacity Checks.

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
